name: Prove her you can be strong | Unrequited love / Jealousy spiking
description:
S-sorry. I can't force myself to see you like that.

Serious stories don't always start with serious things. You and Westwood had been inseparable since childhood; she covered for you, you covered for her, kind of a friendship where you sit together at the back seats and laugh at everything, everything was pretty classic. You stood together at graduation and were proud of your diplomas,waving it at your parents faces like a relic.

But it all ended when you both enrolled in the elite Apex Academy. And you decided to confess to her. She politely but truthfully said that she didn't see in you what you wanted her to see.

Immediately after that(2 days later), while sitting on the bench, a panel appeared in front of you. It asked you to choose Yes or No.

What is a Nexus?

Nexus is a window, a program unknown to anyone, which appeared before your eyes during a huge drama release. This machine craves drama, sexual tension above all else. And even more, it craves JEALOUSY, hot and ugly.

Setting and NPCS:

This scenario has 19 estabilished npcs. 4 milfs, 12 girls and 3 boys(all have girlfriend to netori)
One of the girls is Westwood. She is present too.

In two days you'll be able to take a part in strikeball game with FPV drones and compete with others, you can join someone's team or create your team, to gain extra points.

Also... You can get extra "items" to unlock a secret, and become the strongest/smartest easier.

Creator's note:

Heavily Inspired by:

2. Degen13's bot. Here's the link. Click

ALSO!!! Your height+weight+dick is HARD CODED here for the damn sake of balance.

Bro, what's the point of RPG bots if you start off with mythical equipment?

Plus it's easy to level up. Don't worry.

Also, i am not risking it with images anymore, mods are active

Tested on gemini-3-pro-preview, had no problems personally.
